entries.summary: P1 claimed the northeast and east supply centers.
entries.reasoning: P1 had damage and healing available but no useful combat target on turn one. The raider used its speed to cross the one-hex gap into the northeast center, while the scout reached the east center and the slower units formed behind them.

entries.summary: P2 answered by claiming the west-south supply center.
entries.reasoning: P2 produced no combat attributes, so the scouts pushed safely out of the home cluster. One scout reached the closest supply center, while the marksman and druid moved up to support a later fight for the middle.
